parameters.command: ={{$json.query?.os === 'linux' ? 'echo "{\"hostname\": \"$(hostname)\", \"os\": \"$(cat /etc/os-release 2>/dev/null | grep PRETTY_NAME | cut -d= -f2 | tr -d \'\"\' || echo Linux)\", \"cpu\": \"$(grep \'model name\' /proc/cpuinfo | head -1 | cut -d: -f2 | xargs)\", \"cores\": $(nproc), \"ram_gb\": $(free -g | awk \'NR==2{print $2}\'), \"gpu\": \"$(lspci 2>/dev/null | grep -i vga | cut -d: -f3 | xargs || echo unknown)\", \"disk_free_gb\": \"$(df -BG / | awk \'NR==2{print $4}\' | tr -d G)\"}"' : 'powershell -NoProfile -Command "$h = @{}; $h.hostname = $env:COMPUTERNAME; $h.os = (Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).Caption; $h.cpu = (Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor).Name; $h.cores = (Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor).NumberOfLogicalProcessors; $h.ram_gb = [math]::Round((Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem).TotalPhysicalMemory/1GB,1); $h.gpu = (Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController).Name; $h.vram_gb = [math]::Round((Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController).AdapterRAM/1GB,1); $h.disk_free_gb = [math]::Round((Get-PSDrive C).Free/1GB,1); $h | ConvertTo-Json"'}}
